chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. S- 198 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 564/2022 3.For hearing of CMA 565/2022 4.For hearing of main case 05-05-2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent. Even compliance of order dated 28.04.2023 has not been made. Hence, in terms of said order, instant petition stands dismissed for non- compliance along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
